markdown:
#  Mark a Submittal as Private 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * _To mark the submittals you create on a project as private_ , 'Standard' level permissions to the Project level Submittals tool
    * _To mark any submittal on a project as private_ , 'Admin' level permissions to the Project level Submittals tool
  * **Additional Information** :
    * ​A 'Private' submittal is only visible to the 'Submittal Manager', users added to the Submittal Workflow, members of the distribution list, and users with 'Admin' level permissions to the project's Submittals tool.
      * Users with the '[View Private Submittals Associated to Users within Same Company' granular permission](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/permissions-company/tutorials/grant-granular-permissions-in-a-project-permissions-template) enabled on their permissions template can view a submittal marked 'Private' if another user in their company is the submittal's creator or is designated as the Submittal Manager, a Submitter, an Approver, or a Distribution List member.
    * If you are a user with 'Admin' level permissions to the project's Submittals tool, you can change the default privacy setting for new submittals. See [Mark New Submittals as Private by Default](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/configure-settings-submittals-tool).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Submittals** tool.
  2. Click **Items.**  
![Submittals Items Tab](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/45bd92adaf5322132d1e1d88b41587f1/bf11e35e02fb76ef9722af6decc4fdab/submittals-items-tab.png?fm=webp)  
This reveals a list of the submittals on the project.
  3. Locate the desired submittal in the list and click **Edit**.
  4. Under 'General Information', scroll to the 'Private' label.
  5. Mark the **Private** checkbox.  
![Submittal Mark Private](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/3e9e6c97b28962c2dd370463061f8c0c/96e8ebfb8a7fd03e49da215a43b48c3f/submittal-mark-private.png?fm=webp)
  6. Click **Update**.


## See Also
  * [Duplicate a Submittal](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/duplicate-a-submittal)
  * [Create a Submittal Revision](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/create-a-submittal-revision)
  * [Use Bulk Actions > Edit in the Submittals Tool](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/submittals-project/tutorials/use-bulk-actions-edit-in-the-submittals-tool)


**Submittal Workflow**. The people assigned to complete the [submittal workflow](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms). In Procore, the submittal workflow includes two roles: a [submitter](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms) and the approvers who are responsible for performing/completing the [approval process](https://v2.support.procore.com/glossary-of-terms). Typically, approvers are members of the design team.
title: Mark a Submittal as Private
description: How to make a submittal only visible to users on the distribution list and approvers in the workflow.
